name: Amon.tasminSouth30
title: Daily Minimum Near-Surface Air Temperature
description: monthly mean of the daily-minimum near-surface air temperature.
processing note:
Normally, this should be reported at the 2 meter height. CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Dimensions - CMIP6:longitude latitude time height2m CMIP7:longitude latitude time4 height2m,
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of Amon.tasminSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
